questions.question: By next year, I ___ finished my studies.
She ___ completed the project by Friday.
By 2030, they ___ built 100 new schools.
Will you ___ eaten by 7 pm?
He ___ worked here for 10 years by December.
By the time she calls, I'll ___ already left.
They ___ not finished the report by tomorrow morning.
By next month, we'll have ___ enough money.
She will have ___ the whole novel before the weekend.
By the time you arrive, I ___ cooked dinner.
By next summer, she ___ graduated from university.
They will have ___ the contract by Monday morning.
I'll have ___ the report before the deadline.
By the time we arrive, the meeting ___ already ended.
She will have ___ here for 20 years by next December.
Will they ___ solved the problem by then?
___ he have finished the course by the end of the year?
By 2050, scientists ___ found a cure for many diseases.
I'll have ___ this book before our next meeting.
By the time you get here, I'll ___ already started cooking.

theory.explanation:
Future Perfect – czas przyszły doskonały

Budowa: will have + past participle (3. forma czasownika)
Skrót: I'll have, she'll have...

Kiedy używamy:
Opisujemy czynność, która zostanie zakończona PRZED określonym momentem w przyszłości.

Typowe wyrażenia czasu:
  by next year, by the time, by 2030, by Friday, before the meeting

Formy:
  Twierdzące:  podmiot + will have + pp
  Przeczące:   podmiot + won't have + pp
  Pytania:     Will + podmiot + have + pp?

examples.sentence: By next year, I will have finished my studies.
examples.explanation: Twierdzące: will have + finished (pp). Czynność zakończona przed "next year".

examples.sentence: They will not have finished dinner before we arrive.
examples.explanation: Przeczące: won't have + finished. Czynność NIE zostanie zakończona przed danym momentem.

examples.sentence: Will you have eaten by 7 pm?
examples.explanation: Pytanie: Will + podmiot + have + past participle? Czy czynność będzie zakończona przed podanym czasem?
